headline: Assessing AES (AES) Valuation As Shares Cool After Recent Pullback
summary: AES (AES) has been drawing attention after a recent pullback, with the stock showing a one-month return of about a 13% decline and a past three-month gain of roughly 4%. See our latest analysis for AES. Looking beyond the recent pullback, AES has a 1 year total shareholder return of about 15% despite a year to date share price decline of roughly 4%. This suggests momentum has cooled after earlier gains as investors reassess risk and future cash flow potential at around $14.20 per share. If...

headline: Alphabet (GOOGL) Sees Optimistic Coverage From Analysts
summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) is one of the AI Stocks That Will Skyrocket. Technology giant Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL)’s shares were on banking giant Wells Fargo’s radar on February 23rd. headline: How The AES (AES) Story Is Shifting Toward A US$15 Take Private Deal
summary: The latest update edges AES’s fair value estimate from US$15.29 to US$15.33, keeping it closely aligned with the proposed US$15 per share cash offer. That small move reflects how research houses are now anchoring their price targets around the Global Infrastructure Partners and EQT Infrastructure VI bid, rather than earlier standalone values in the low US$20s. As you read on, you will see how this evolving analyst narrative can shape the way you track AES from here. Stay updated as the Fair...
